title: Professional Standards Authority: annual report and accounts 2024 to 2025
body: "PSA’s annual report and accounts covers performance and activities to protect the public by improving the regulation and registration of people who work in health and care across the UK.  The report includes PSA’s annual accounts and audited statements for 2024 to 2025 and discloses PSA’s income and expenditure for each of its areas of work.  "
